title: Heads, You’re Dead!
description: A provocative horror drama that forces you to reckon with your own assumptions.
quote: Heads, I win. Tails, you’re dead!
altHero: escaped convict with sharp teeth laughing as a coin flips in the air
alt1: convict stands near a toll booth in the desert, a man’s face peeking out
alt2: man crying and crouched inside the toll booth
alt4: a raven flies with the sun behind in the sky
